themes: Managers across a wide range of franchise, multifamily, and hospitality brands are the dominant segment, signaling strong demand for features that simplify day-to-day location reporting and workflow management at scale.

Wait times spanning 10 to 362 days reveal a significant and growing backlog, with the longest-waiting contacts concentrated in real estate, travel, fitness, and automotive verticals—indicating these industries have the most urgent unmet product needs.

Multiple contacts from the same accounts—Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, Anytime Fitness, Ford, and others—appear repeatedly, suggesting these enterprise customers have broad, cross-team interest in product improvements and may warrant dedicated discovery sessions.
